assessments.rationale: Gear rotor profiles, crescent inserts, vane profiles, and shaft blanks are all constant cross-section geometries along their length. Perfect match for cold-drawing capability.
Pump rotors, crescent inserts, shafts are alloy steel (42CrMo4, C45, 100Cr6). Bronze/brass components (wear rings, impellers for chemical service) are not ZOLLERN's target position.
New pump platform designs may require <100 kg prototype batches. Aftermarket/MRO replacement packs may be small volume per geometry.
assessments.mitigation: Amortize die cost into piece price; geometry sharing from die library for similar pump families

assessments.rationale: New rotor cross-section geometries require custom dies. For repeat geometries (established pump platforms), lead time = shipping only.
assessments.mitigation: Die library of common involute and crescent profiles; rapid prototyping from nearest die

assessments.rationale: Pump internals operate in oil/hydraulic fluid environment. Corrosion protection is provided by the operating medium and downstream surface treatment (nitriding, hard chrome). Not a constraint for blank supply.
